name: eslint-plugin-codex-taste
description: ESLint-compatible oxlint plugin for selected Codex React and TypeScript taste rules.

scripts.check: node --check lint/index.js && node --check lint/hodor.js && node --check lint/utils.js && node --check lint/built-in-taste-rules.js && find lint/rules -name rule.js -exec node --check {} \;
scripts.fmt: oxfmt lint package.json package-lock.json oxlint.config.mjs tsconfig.json
scripts.fmt:check: oxfmt --check lint package.json package-lock.json oxlint.config.mjs tsconfig.json
